objective: Extend the recovery worker write-set by exactly one connected assurance test and freeze exact replay as zero-write both before and after ledger reopen.
executable_blocker: The connected assurance test encodes the superseded rule that an identical same-session checkpoint delivery must fail, which directly contradicts the stage's exact zero-write replay contract.

semantic_correction.checkpoint_result: the same original LedgerEvent is returned with zero new events for all eight exact bindings in either context
semantic_correction.completion_result: the same original LedgerEvent is returned with zero new events for all six exact bindings in either context
semantic_correction.conflict_result: any binding conflict is rejected with zero new events in either context
semantic_correction.forbidden_compatibility_rule: no persisted-reopen-boundary prerequisite or session-sensitive replay behavior

preservation_contract: all original envelope constraints acceptance commands and stop conditions remain active
the added assurance file changes only the superseded identical-checkpoint expectation and connected zero-write assertions
portable-reference stale-fence sequence-conflict chain and append-only checks remain fail-closed
no test skip xfail broad exception reduced mutation matrix or removed negative case
no source contract schema event vocabulary dependency database or capability expansion
acceptance_commands: python3 -m unittest tests.test_stage1_ledger tests.test_stage1_assurance tests.test_stage1_execution tests.test_stage1_execution_assurance tests.test_stage1_reference_vertical tests.test_stage1_recovery -v
exact eight-file write-set same-session and reopen replay matrix plus assertion skip dependency private-locator network live-authority and weakening scan
stop_conditions: exact checkpoint or completion replay depends on process or connection reopen
same-session or reopened exact replay appends an event or returns a different event
same-session or reopened conflicting replay is accepted or mutates the ledger
added assurance edit changes any unrelated scenario assertion or portable-reference rule
write-set contract schema event dependency database or capability expands
rollback: Agent 0 discards the worker commit and reverts this one-test authority amendment. No runtime database, domain state, external system or live authority is changed.
